name: ui-sequencer-board
description: SequencerBoard — order-the-steps puzzle: player places actions into slots; CHECK guard compares slot sequence against solution; win on exact match.

schema.name: ui-sequencer-board
schema.description: SequencerBoard — order-the-steps puzzle: player places actions into slots; CHECK guard compares slot sequence against solution; win on exact match.

emits.description: placeEvent prop — emitted when player drops an action into a slot
removeEvent prop — emitted when player removes an action from a slot
playEvent prop — emitted with the current slot sequence on playback start
Advances playback one step; entity.currentStep increments until maxSlots-1 then returns to building
checkEvent prop — emitted when player submits the sequence for validation
playAgainEvent prop — reset slots and restart

events.name: Place
events.description: placeEvent prop — emitted when player drops an action into a slot

events.name: Remove
events.description: removeEvent prop — emitted when player removes an action from a slot

events.name: Play
events.description: playEvent prop — emitted with the current slot sequence on playback start

events.name: Check
events.description: checkEvent prop — emitted when player submits the sequence for validation

events.name: Step
events.description: Advances playback one step; entity.currentStep increments until maxSlots-1 then returns to building

events.name: Play Again
events.description: playAgainEvent prop — reset slots and restart

effects: Put the steps in the right order to start the day right.
You always brush your teeth before breakfast.
Put the steps in the right order to start the day right.
You always brush your teeth before breakfast.

allowDuplicates.label: Allow Duplicates
allowDuplicates.description: When true the same action can be placed in multiple slots.

headerImage.label: Header Image
headerImage.description: Optional banner image shown at the top of the board.

hint.default: You always brush your teeth before breakfast.
hint.label: Hint

slots.label: Slots
slots.description: Initial empty slot positions; one entry per maxSlots step.

stepDurationMs.label: Step Duration Ms
stepDurationMs.description: Playback speed in milliseconds per step.

successMessage.label: Success Message
successMessage.description: Message shown when the player wins.

availableActions.label: Available Actions
availableActions.description: Draggable action cards the player picks from.

maxSlots.label: Max Slots
maxSlots.description: Number of slots the player fills — must match the solution length.

title.label: Title
title.description: Puzzle title shown above the sequencer.

solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.description: Accepted winning sequences — at least one must match the player's slot order.

categoryColors.label: Category Colors
categoryColors.description: Category → color mapping for action card tinting.

description.default: Put the steps in the right order to start the day right.
description.label: Description
description.description: One-line puzzle brief shown to the player.
